message:
fix(release): disable cosign new-bundle-format so signing step works on v3.x (#9365)

The nightly release started failing on 2026-04-21 with:

  Error: signing dist/checksums.txt: create bundle file: open : no such file or directory

Root cause: sigstore/cosign-installer pins v4.1.1 of the action but does
not pin a cosign-release, so the installer picks its default. Between
the 2026-04-20 release (cosign v2.4.3, success) and the 2026-04-21
release (cosign v3.0.5, failure) the default crossed into cosign v3.x.

In cosign v3 the --new-bundle-format flag defaults to true and the
--bundle output path is required. With the flag implicitly on, the
legacy --output-signature / --output-certificate flags are silently
ignored and cosign tries to open an empty bundle path, producing the
error above. The release job also skips helm-release and fires the
release-failure + workflow-failure notifiers, creating paired issues.

Fix: pass --new-bundle-format=false so cosign keeps writing the legacy
.sig / .pem outputs that the scorecard Signed-Releases check and every
prior kubestellar/console release already rely on. No consumer-visible
artifact change — the release assets stay identical to pre-v3 behavior.

Fixes Issue 9335, Fixes Issue 9336

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -301,7 +301,19 @@ jobs:
           # Sign checksums file with keyless cosign (Sigstore OIDC)
           # The scorecard Signed-Releases check looks for .sig files
           # attached to GitHub release assets
+          #
+          # --new-bundle-format=false: cosign v3.x defaults this to true and
+          # then requires --bundle to be specified; with the flag enabled the
+          # legacy --output-signature / --output-certificate flags are silently
+          # ignored and cosign fails with
+          #   "create bundle file: open : no such file or directory"
+          # because no --bundle path is set. Disabling the new bundle format
+          # restores the legacy .sig/.pem output that the scorecard
+          # Signed-Releases check and prior releases rely on. See
+          # https://github.com/sigstore/cosign/releases/tag/v3.0.1 for the
+          # v3 --bundle-required change.
           cosign sign-blob --yes \
+            --new-bundle-format=false \
             --output-signature dist/checksums.txt.sig \
             --output-certificate dist/checksums.txt.pem \
             dist/checksums.txt
